about.title: About
about.lead: I am a final-year software engineering student at the Université de Technologie de Belfort-Montbéliard (UTBM). Fascinated by computers since my very first moments behind a keyboard, I’m proud to be turning that passion into my future profession.
about.lead2: I’m particularly interested in full-stack development (web, mobile, or desktop), as well as in every part of the software creation process: project management, software quality, and DevOps.
about.lead3: Outside of computer science, I’m passionate about road cycling. Discovering this discipline was a true revelation for me, pushing me to constantly test my own limits — with ultra-endurance events on the horizon!

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.lead: For any inquiry or proposal, feel free to reach out using the contact details below, or follow me on social media.

projects.title: Projects
projects.more_cta: Check out my GitHub for more projects!
projects.sample_title_1: PLSres - Academic resource sharing web app
projects.sample_desc_1: Development of a full-stack web application for the PL$tek student association, providing access to academic resources (including exercise and exam solutions) from collective review sessions. Integrated with the Discord API for authentication and alignment with the association's existing workflow.
projects.sample_desc_2: Development of a tool that allows users to create simple AI models (MLPs on tabular data) through a web interface. It enables data upload, preprocessing, model creation and training, as well as performance evaluation.
projects.sample_title_3: HyTracker - Game stats tracking mobile app
projects.sample_desc_3: Development of a mobile app for Hypixel (Minecraft server) players to track their PvP statistics (SkyWars, BedWars, Duels), built using the public Hypixel API.

givemefive.title: Full-Stack Developer Intern
givemefive.description: Joined the Agile development team of an interactive pricing calculator. I developed both frontend and backend features, along with unit and functional tests.

utbm_engineer.title: Software Engineering Program
utbm_engineer.description: Completed the Development specialization: project management, software design, software quality, Java EE, and Cloud Computing. Currently pursuing the Networks and Cybersecurity specialization, including a strong DevOps component.

primorska.title: Study Abroad Semester

utbm_prep.title: Common Core Program
utbm_prep.description: General courses: mathematics, mechanics, algorithms, and programming, with a focus on fundamental computer science concepts.
